title: Arc/Box AuthProvider blanket impls require manual mirroring — no compiler enforcement
description: auth.rs has two blanket impls (Box and Arc) each with a comment warning every method added to AuthProvider must be mirrored here. Adding a new method without updating both impls gives a compile error, which is a build-time catch but recurring friction. The two impls are structurally identical. A macro_rules delegation macro would eliminate duplication. Also: JmapChatClient::new takes impl AuthProvider plus static and wraps in Arc internally, so callers who already hold Arc<dyn AuthProvider> end up double-wrapping. This works due to the blanket impl but is semantically odd and undocumented.
